summary: Tested TQS (Trade Quality Score) integration with Analyst agent (iteration 65). TQS scores now appear in analyst responses with all 5 pillars. Fixed 4 bugs related to TechnicalSnapshot dataclass access pattern. Trading bot auto-recording of trade outcomes verified as properly wired.

minor.issue: Several services don't have expected methods (get_sector_context, analyze_symbol, get_ib_data) - non-critical, background jobs

critical_code_review_comments: TQS integration with Analyst agent is complete - all 5 pillars showing in analysis responses
TechnicalSnapshot is a dataclass, not a dict - fixed all places that were calling .get() on it
Trade outcome auto-recording properly wired: trading_bot._learning_loop uses LearningLoopService.record_trade_outcome()

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 verified TQS integration with Analyst agent. All 5 TQS pillars (setup, technical, fundamental, context, execution) now appear in analysis responses. Fixed TechnicalSnapshot.get() bug in 5 files. Trading bot auto-recording is wired via trading_bot._learning_loop = learning_loop_service.
rca_of_issues: Main issue was TechnicalSnapshot being a dataclass but code treating it as dict (calling .get()). Fixed by using getattr() instead. Also missing await for async get_technical_snapshot() calls.
